review_title: Influx is a useful tool for healthcare professionals
description: Overall, Influx MD is a useful addition to many healthcare settings.
author: Kara F.
pros: A few clinical sites that I was at used Influx, and it was rather useful. It is HIPPA compliant which makes data sharing seamless.
cons: There were times where the software would freeze, and it took a bit to get used to the interface but overall it was a useful tool.

author: Alex W.
pros: Clean and simple way to organize patient data. Helps me manage outreach efforts and follow up with leads. Support is easily accessible.
cons: Occasional issues saving new contact forms. Would like to be able to customize fields on page views for patients.

review_title: Product limitations exacerbated by major customer service challenges
description: Our biggest concern (and ultimately the primary reason for terminating our contract) was the terrible customer service we received. We started with one primary contact during the onboarding process, and after we had multiple questions related to development, a developer seemed to step in as our primary contact going forward. He was consistently rude, dismissive, and defensive--despite every attempt to have an open conversation about how we could repair the relationship and better partner moving forward. When we pointed out errors that needed to be fixed, it was often responded to with finger-pointing the blame towards someone on our team. It was very frustrating, and we made many compromises during our set-up process simply out of the desire to be finished with the constant communication headaches. We chose InfluxMD, in part, because of the positive reviews we read during our research. We wanted to do our part to ensure the other side of the experience is also represented, because our experience was anything but positive. We have thankfully found a software partner who meets all the technical needs that InfluxMD could not accommodate, and who has a wonderful team who collaborates and partners well.
author: Tamara Y.
pros: We were thrilled to find a HIPPA-compliant CRM software solution at such a reasonable price point. We read great reviews on multiple software sites, and the overall solution was positioned to us as user-friendly so that we would need limited support after implementation.
cons: The software itself had some limitations when it came to customizations that met our process needs. Additionally, certain fields would become locked by the system once entered, and our users had to go through the InfluxMD ticketing process just to change basic field entry data, which is quite cumbersome when you consider that user error happens regularly, and the need to edit leads data also happens regularly. Reporting capabilities were very disappointing. We had to initiate a new ticket/request for every basic reporting need, and the team delivered the bare minimum as far as the fields/output of the reports we did request. I highly recommend ensuring you get the reports you want prior to implementation, as this team seems to be "hands-off" when it comes to requests post-launch.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Software That Enables Rapid Growth
description: In a word, transformative. In certain types of medical practices, you need to screen a quite a few people to get to the people you can help. InfluxMD allowed my team to scale the number of people we engage with, while providing leads with a great experience. We are on pace to doubling our practice from last year.
author: Greg I.
pros: • Ability to customize the software to our specific process needs • Customizable views for each agent, so each agent knows who they need to reach each day • Ease of use – Everyone on the team, tech savvy or not, has quickly adopted to using InfluxMD • Ability to text have text and email conversations with leads; all captured in the same place. • Good reporting • Very responsive support team
cons: • Ability to go backward in the process. InfluxMD, once you have completed a step. We have designed around this, though we always have a small handful of exceptions. • Integration with our EMR would be a great feature.

review_title: The software has helped increase business tremendously. It's been wonderful.
author: Felecia E.
pros: The lead tracking system and how IFX has been able to customize to our needs and workflows is exceptional. This software is so helpful in keeping track of patients progress through our program and education, they get to surgery more quickly. Getting this software has transformed our practice in a very positive way.
cons: In the beginning it was difficult for us making the transition because we had very particular workflows we wanted built in to the software, so it took a little bit of time and effort to get it customized just for us, but this is like with anything. So I don't really see this a fault but I don't really have any cons to offer.

author: Samantha K.
pros: The clients have easy access to me. It allows you to see all interactions between the different users. If you are in the elite program and have the videos being sent to inactive clients, it's a good marketing source. It's customization is helpful.
cons: It's had a few glitches overtime. I wish it generated a report showing a pie chart of percentages of which referral source referred how many clients.

review_title: Great company that will tailor your website/software to your needs
author: Lindsey J.
pros: Software tailored to practice needs Allows us to have customizable patient education using our physicians rather than just general health handouts found online or through other video softwares (like Emmi) Lead alerts sent via email to remind one to follow up
cons: It would be nice if the software were able to link to practice scheduling software so that when we check someone in on our EMR it automatically marks the patient's attendance on this software.

review_title: Works very well with the management of lead tracking and analysis of spending.
author: Bryan W.
pros: Information is entered with multiple users at multiple locations. All users then have access to the leads and more importantly can search for information that each user needs.
cons: Has many additional capabilities that need to be taught to be full utilized. This work can be tedious but it is worth it in the long run because it makes you better and also enables you to understand your marketing efforts and spend.

review_title: Great! Customer support is very helpful and responds immediately .
description: It helps keep track of the type of patients we see, how many scheduled, how many actually kept the appointment, if anyone was missed. its tied in to our website, so patients can email us, request appointments ask questions, we can email them. It is very user friendly!!!
author: Isabell C.
pros: This system is very easy to use and keeps up with your patients. What I like the most about it is that it has automatic reminders in place, and will send a link for new patient forms, to new patients after they have scheduled an appointment. Love it! This automatically takes a step away from us.

review_title: Influx has helped streamline the process of following our leads all the way through surgery approval
author: Jeni S.
pros: It is extremely user friendly for all staff members to utilize. It allows us to follow prospective patients through scheduling their initial consult all the way through the pre surgical requirements to having surgery.
cons: It would be nice if it integrated with our EMR software but then again that might be cumbersome too.

review_title: The Influx program is very easy to use and they have a great support team.
description: Tracking our patient's progress from their first point of contact with us to their final visit with our physicians. As well as the reporting of wins vs. losses.
author: Angela S.
pros: I like the ease and quality of this software and the customer service is great! I appreciate the ease of tracking our new patient's information.
cons: I do not care for updates that change the flow of my day to day efficiency. There are a few functions that I do not use and therefore would rather not have them visible.

review_title: user friendly but would like updates
author: Ebony J.
pros: Provides tracking for multiple patient procedures. I am able to track what patients have completed and still need to complete as well as email them directly.
cons: I would like the tracking and notifications to be more precise. I would like to know ahead of time a list of patients who are very close to completing their requirements. Also, receive patients notifications sooner.

review_title: Excellent product with great customer service.
description: If there was ever an attribute we did not desire, the Influx team has deleted it. They are there to make our experience and workflow easy.
author: Leigh L.
pros: What I like most about this software is that I have all information in one place. All data is easily accessible which means tracking our patients and prospects is no longer a daunting task, it's a breeze.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the quality and the ease of use of Influx MD especially its tracking option. They have a very great support team.
cons: It has errors sometimes especially when we try to integrate it with our scheduling platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: John S.
pros: I can search my database several ways. Very easy to use.
cons: Nothing. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] makes changes as U realize I need them.

author: Nicole B.
pros: Very customizable. Allows us to track and record multiple patient procedures. Easy to set up. Customer service is great.
cons: I think that if the software were able to link to practice scheduling so that the patients attendance was automatically linked with our EMR, it might make things a little easier.

review_title: Influx has been a place for me to track all leads
author: Kristin C.
pros: easy to use and keep track of leads, I like that I can receive reminders on when to follow up with patients
cons: It would be nice to show all points of contact in a more general table- it is hard because you have to open each patient separately

review_title: I'm still getting up to speed with this software, but, the Company behind it is stellar.
author: Carolyn D.
pros: We searched high and low to find a lead management software that also "handled" drip marketing campaigns, and InfluxMD came through! Great support behind the scenes and lots of experience to guide us along the way!
cons: The only thing that has been missing for me, so far, is that the software isn't integrated with our Scheduling Software.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
